evals.name: new-project-init
evals.prompt: I want to start a new project: a task management CLI tool written in Go that uses SQLite for storage. Let's follow the Spec-Driven Design process.
evals.expected_output: The assistant should initialize the .spec/ directory and create the CONSTITUTION.md based on the project requirements and the Nine Articles of Development.

evals.name: feature-addition
evals.prompt: I have an existing React app. I want to add a feature for 'User Profile Photos' using AWS S3 for storage. Please start the SDD process for this feature.
evals.expected_output: The assistant should guide the user through the Specification phase (SPECIFICATION.md) for the new feature, focusing on the User Journeys and Functional Requirements without jumping into implementation.
